_comment_intro: Lighthouse CI config. Drives the GitHub Actions workflow at .github/workflows/lighthouse.yml. Runs against the built dist/ via `vite preview` after `npm run build`.

collect._comment_runs: One run per URL keeps CI under 2 min. Bump to 3 if scores get noisy.

assert._comment_thresholds: Floors, not targets. Failing one of these blocks the PR. Performance is intentionally lower than the others because the alphabet blanket gallery has lots of large JPEGs — Image CDN would push it higher but isn't enabled yet.

upload._comment_upload: Temporary public storage (Lighthouse's own free tier). The result URL gets posted as a PR comment so reviewers can click through to the full Lighthouse report.
